scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.start:prod: npx prisma generate --schema=packages/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=packages/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node packages/backend/dist/index.js
